title: Launch relay scenario models missing signature and replay defenses
impact_summary: Webhook endpoints are high-trust ingestion points, so missing signature or replay protections can have outsized impact.
why_this_matters: Teams often add webhook endpoints quickly and only later standardize verification and replay checks.
evidence_fixture: fixture-only webhook headers and illustrative unsafe handler example
suggested_patch_summary: Verify signatures, timestamps, event types, and replay windows before any processing.
verification_summary: Verified as safe because only deterministic fixture payloads are accepted.
replay_regression_note: Replay the documented fixture payload and show that the live route remains side-effect free.
